content_text: Bot Development Jobs for May 2026 | Freelancer Image 1www.freelancer.com/jobs/bot-development/ I need a lightweight Telegram **userbot** that listens for my text commands in any chat I'm active in and instantly: • rolls a die when I invoke a custom command (e.g. /d6, /d20, /d100) • returns pure random numbers on demand (e.g. /rand 1-500) • appends a short custom message I'll define per command to the result, so the output might read "You rolled a 17! — Lucky day!" rather ...
